headline: AppLovin Expands AI Marketing Ambitions While New Platforms And SEC Risks Grow
summary: AppLovin (NasdaqGS:APP) is accelerating its push into AI-driven performance marketing with new generative AI advertising tools. The company is expanding its e-commerce platform as part of a broader shift in its business model. AppLovin is reportedly developing its own social networking platform after an unsuccessful attempt to acquire TikTok assets. The company is currently the subject of an active SEC investigation, adding regulatory uncertainty. For you as an investor, AppLovin sits at...
